name: Blood Ancestor Confrontation
description: Wang Lin battles the Blood Ancestor, a remnant of the ancient era. Establishes Wang Lin as a power capable of contesting ancient existences.
_comment: Karmic Nexus node: Blood Ancestor Confrontation. Per architectural review: RI is a novel about karma. karmic_weight is signed (+ = debt owed TO bearer, - = grudge held BY bearer). Prime Directive: unresolved karma persists objectively until paid.
